description: UI fixes: Kyushu harvest hex position, card text icon styling, Tea ceremony accent, season cards modal legend button visibility, and discount text alignment
steps: 1. In src/components/GameBoard.tsx, find the HARVEST_BADGE_META entry for 'kyushu' which currently has position { x: 170, y: 750 }. Change x from 170 to 160 (move 10px to the left).

2. In src/utils/renderCardEffect.tsx, modify the rendering so that: (a) bushi and shinto icons get color '#c8a951' (gold) instead of undefined/currentColor - update COLOR_MAP to add entries 'bushi': '#c8a951' and 'shinto': '#c8a951'; (b) When an icon token has a numeric amount (the {amount} span), style it with fontWeight: 'bold' and color: '#c8a951' (gold) to make numbers accompanying icons stand out.
3. In src/components/PoliticsTrack.tsx, find the tooltip text 'Ceremonia del Te' (around line 254) and change it to 'Ceremonia del Te\u0301' or simply 'Ceremonia del T\u00E9' (with accent on the e).

4. In src/components/SeasonCardsModal.tsx, the legend button has className='legend-btn' inside a div with style={{ position: 'absolute', top: '0.6rem', left: '0.9rem', zIndex: 1 }}. The zIndex of 1 is too low - the close button has zIndex:1 too and the modal title/content can overlay it. Change zIndex to 10 or higher to ensure it's always visible above modal content.

5. In src/components/SeasonCardsModal.tsx, the discount text display in the title area shows '(descuento -<CoinIcon/>)' inline. The issue is the alignment of the coin icon and discount number in the card cost display. In the season-card-cost span inside each card, when showing discounted price, ensure the elements have proper flex alignment. Also check the modal title's discount span - add verticalAlign: 'middle' and display: 'inline-flex' with alignItems: 'center' to the parent span if not already present.
acceptance_criteria: Kyushu harvest hex position x is 160 (moved 10px left from 170)
Bushi and shinto icons in card effect text render in gold (#c8a951)
Numbers accompanying icons in card effect text are bold and gold
PoliticsTrack tooltip shows 'Ceremonia del Te' with accent (Te with tilde)
Legend '?' button in SeasonCardsModal is visible above other content
Build passes with npm run build
